package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCachingJsonCacheValueStoredAsString() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_caching_json_cache_value_stored_as_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Caching. Flag caches that store JSON strings only to unmarshal them again before every use."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
